economic_notes: OCN has investments in cannabis, food and beverage, casino and transportation industries. Business entities include Kikiwak Inn, OCN Shell, Sports Traders, OCN Smart Farm, Aseneskak Casino Limited Partnership, The Pas IGA, Otineka Development Corporation, Paskwayak Business Development Corporation, Paskwayak Construction LP, Paskwayak LP, Paskwayak NAC Investment LP, Pinesiw Energy LP, and OCN VLT Centre.
notes: Fiscal year 2022 (ended March 31, 2022). Audit report dated March 13, 2023. 7 programs/entities fully consolidated and 13 business entities accounted for using modified equity method. Large deferred revenue balance of $34M. Significant FNFA long-term debt of ~$55M secured by provincial gaming revenue and tax rebates. Loans receivable of $13.9M including $13M to Meta Growth Corp at 10%. Investment in cannabis industry noted as material credit risk concentration. Total government transfers calculated as ISC + FNIH + ESDC + CMHC + NRC + Public Safety Canada + Province of Manitoba + AMC + MKO = $55,538,257 + $12,074,570 + $1,532,936 + $981,335 + $46,914 + $344,298 + $2,959,283 + $1,135,305 + $1,799,016 = $76,412,914; OSR = band generated + interest + other + rental - eliminations = $3,535,108 + $1,837,982 + $3,476,478 + $2,877,805 - $2,482,635 = $9,244,738. Net financial assets per statement of changes in net assets: $13,647,758. Construction in progress of $6,875,883 not included in tangible capital assets net book value. Remuneration schedule not included in extracted text.
